title: lomatium cous
intro: Lomatium cous, also known as Lomatium cous, is a perennial plant native to the western United States and Canada, belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Lomatium cous include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Lomatium cous can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional herbal remedies.
